notes: No current live whole-unit condominium/apartment rentals were found in Taman Wawasan / Bandar Baru Mersing itself. EdgeProp shows Taman Wawasan, Mersing with FOR RENT (0), Nextsix reports no properties found for apartment rentals in Mersing, and Mitula's Mersing condo/apartment pages surfaced only non-local or non-matching results (e.g., houses, shops, or listings outside Mersing). Because of that, there is no qualifying live-listing sample to compute min/max/average/median from the exact locality.
